outcome: Periphery 2.21.2 binary fails to initialize on this environment: 'Failed to initialize shell: i/o error: No such file or directory (os error 2)'. The error occurs before any scan logic runs, suggesting a binary/architecture incompatibility. The tool cannot be evaluated.
next_steps: Retry with a source-built Periphery or a different installation method. The index store contract (Ticket 09) is verified and ready — Periphery would consume it with --skip-build --index-store-path. When the tool runs successfully, normalize debug/Objective-C/dynamic-reference exclusions and commit an advisory finding snapshot with triage categories.
promotion_decision: Non-promotion (cannot evaluate). Advisory operation retained. A no-new-findings guard is NOT promoted because the pilot could not produce signal.
